diagnostics.findings: High-resolution aerial imagery of the undefined in Zone A reveals distinct leaf curling, greyish-green color shifts, and visible soil crust cracking. Upper canopy shows initial signs of tip burn.
recommendations: Initiate drip-irrigation cycle immediately for 120 minutes.
Apply organic straw mulch to reduce evaporation rates.

recommendations.title: Critical Dryness in Zone A
recommendations.description: Soil moisture in undefined is at 8%. Recommended immediate watering.

recommendations.title: Water Deficiency (Drought stress)
recommendations.description: High-resolution aerial imagery of the undefined in Zone A reveals distinct leaf curling, greyish-green color shifts, and visible soil crust cracking. Upper canopy shows initial signs of tip burn.
recommendations: Initiate drip-irrigation cycle immediately for 120 minutes.
Apply organic straw mulch to reduce evaporation rates.
